g.text: Compared with the old STF3-Lite diagram, ResNet18, pixel difference, SmallCNN and FFT-only modules are replaced by foundation embeddings, D3/ReStraV dynamics, WaveRep-style wavelet-spectral statistics and branch-token fusion.
